scripts.verify:web:quick: npm run lint --workspace @wos/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @wos/web
scripts.verify:bff:quick: npm run lint --workspace @wos/bff && npm run typecheck --workspace @wos/bff
scripts.verify:domain:quick: npm run lint --workspace @wos/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @wos/domain
scripts.verify:quick: npm run verify:web:quick && npm run verify:bff:quick && npm run verify:domain:quick
scripts.gen:types: supabase gen types typescript --workdir apps/supabase --local --schema public 2>/dev/null > apps/web/src/shared/api/supabase/types.ts
